$comment: The Finding Disconfirmation Pass's budget block (docs/finding-disconfirmation.md §5) — exactly ONE per Refutation Record; the mechanical basis for cap-bound disclosure. eligible = |Must-Fix ∪ HIGH Should-Fix| at lock (disposition-skipped findings excluded), cap = 15, processed = min(eligible, cap), bound = (eligible > processed) — refutation-evidence checks the arithmetic. refutation-coverage honors a letter-body `<!-- refutation: not-attempted-budget F-… -->` disclosure marker ONLY under bound:true for an unprocessed id — a marker on a processed finding, or under an unbound budget, is an ERROR (the marker is a disclosure, not an exemption you can reach for). A zero-eligible run still writes the record with eligible: 0 (absence-vs-skip stays distinguishable). Closed-keyed (additionalProperties:false; closed_keys true in _coverage.json): the fixed five-field set makes the misspelled-field kill free. Validated by scripts/refutation_check.py via scripts/apodictic_artifacts.py.
title: APODICTIC finding-disconfirmation budget (apodictic.refutation_budget.v1)
